page_content:
ANTH263 Sexuality and Culture (3 Credits)

An overview of sexuality from an anthropological perspective, looking

at aspects of sexuality within our own culture and in cultures around

the world. Course topics include the biology and culture of sex, gender, physical attraction, sexual orientation, marriage and mating taboos, fertility control, sexually transmitted diseases, and commercial aspects of sex.

Credit Only Granted for. ANTH298K or ANTH263.
